title: Interpreting the strong clustering of ultra-diffuse galaxies by halo spin bias
summary: We use the IllustrisTNG300-ODM simulation to investigate the spin bias of low-mass halos and its connection to the strong clustering of ultra-diffuse galaxies (UDGs) reported by Zhang et al. (2025). By comparing two halo spin definitions-one using only bound particles ($λ_{\rm b}$) and another including unbound particles ($λ_{\rm a}$)-we demonstrate that the spin bias of low-mass halos critically depends on the definition. While $λ_{\rm a}$ yields stronger clustering for higher-spin halos at all masses, $λ_{\rm b}$ produces an inverted trend below $M_{\rm h}\sim 10^{11} \rm M_{\odot}/h$. This discrepancy is driven by a subset of halos in high-density environments that have large $λ_{\rm a}$ but small $λ_{\rm b}$. Using an empirical model implemented in SDSS-like mocks, we link the stellar surface-mass-density ($Σ_\ast$) of a galaxy to $λ_{\rm a}$ of its host halo and find an anti-correlation that more diffuse dwarfs tend to reside in higher-spin halos. The model naturally reproduces the observed strong clustering of UDGs within the standard $Λ$CDM framework without invoking exotic assumptions such as self-interacting dark matter. The high fraction of unbound particles in UDG hosts likely originates from tidal fields in dense regions, an effect particularly significant for low-mass halos. We discuss how the angular momentum of a halo represented by $λ_{\rm a}$ may be transferred to the gas to affect size and surface density of the galaxy that forms in the halo.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过模拟发现低质量暗晕的自旋偏差定义依赖性，解释了超弥散星系强成团现象，无需引入奇异暗物质假设。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在解释Zhang等人（2025）观测到的超弥散星系（UDGs）强成团现象，探究低质量暗晕的自旋偏差如何依赖于自旋定义，并验证标准ΛCDM框架下是否能够解释这一观测结果。
AI.method: 使用IllustrisTNG300-ODM模拟，比较两种暗晕自旋定义：仅使用束缚粒子的λb和包含非束缚粒子的λa。通过经验模型将星系恒星表面质量密度Σ*与宿主暗晕的λa关联，并在SDSS类模拟中实现。
AI.result: 发现低质量暗晕的自旋偏差强烈依赖于定义：λa在所有质量下都显示高自旋暗晕更强成团，而λb在Mh<10¹¹ M⊙/h时呈现相反趋势。高密度环境中部分暗晕具有大λa但小λb。模型成功重现观测到的UDGs强成团现象。
AI.conclusion: 超弥散星系的强成团现象可以在标准ΛCDM框架内解释，无需引入自相互作用暗物质等奇异假设。UDG宿主中高比例非束缚粒子可能源于密集区域的潮汐场效应，暗晕的角动量（以λa表示）可能影响星系大小和表面密度。

title: Reviving sub-keV warm dark matter: a UVLF-based analysis
comment: 17 pages of main text, 7 figures, 2 tables
summary: Thermal warm dark matter (WDM) particles with $m_{\rm WDM} \leq 1~\mathrm{keV}$ are ruled out at more than $4σ$ by multiple observational probes, owing to the strong suppression of small-scale structure induced by early-time free-streaming. Recently, it was highlighted that a small admixture of $\sim1\%$ ($f_{\rm CDM} \sim\!0.01$) cold dark matter (CDM) endowed with a blue-tilted isocurvature spectrum could offset the WDM-induced suppression and relax the WDM mass bound by a factor of $\mathcal{O}(10)$. If viable, this ''warm + cold-isocurvature'' scenario would allow sub-keV WDM particles to constitute nearly the full dark matter abundance while potentially alleviating some small-scale tensions. In this work, we test this mechanism by constraining the WDM mass $m_{\rm WDM}$ while marginalizing over CDM isocurvature parameters. We combine ultraviolet luminosity function measurements from the \textit{Hubble Space Telescope} and \textit{James Webb Space Telescope} over redshift $4 \leq z \leq 11$ with CMB, BAO, and SNe data. For a pure WDM model, our joint analysis yields a lower bound $m_{\rm WDM} > 1.8~\mathrm{keV}$ (95% credible intervals). When CDM isocurvature is introduced at $f_{\rm CDM} = 0.01$, the limit relaxes to $m_{\rm WDM} > 0.27~\mathrm{keV}$ (95% credible intervals), reflecting a shallow degeneracy in which blue-tilted isocurvature fluctuations partially compensate for WDM suppression. These results provide new constraints on thermal WDM in the presence of CDM isocurvature fluctuations and quantify the extent to which such fluctuations can mask the small-scale signatures of light relics.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过结合多种观测数据，测试了"暖暗物质+冷暗物质等曲率扰动"模型，发现即使只有1%的冷暗物质具有蓝倾斜等曲率谱，也能显著放宽对暖暗物质质量的限制。
AI.motivation: 先前研究表明，质量小于1keV的暖暗物质(WDM)因早期自由流效应抑制小尺度结构而被排除。最近有人提出，少量(约1%)具有蓝倾斜等曲率谱的冷暗物质(CDM)可以抵消WDM的抑制效应，从而放宽WDM质量限制。本研究旨在测试这种"暖+冷等曲率"机制的有效性。
AI.method: 结合哈勃太空望远镜和詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜在红移4-11范围内的紫外光度函数测量数据，以及CMB、BAO和超新星数据。通过边缘化处理CDM等曲率参数，约束WDM质量。
AI.result: 对于纯WDM模型，联合分析得到95%置信区间的下限为m_WDM > 1.8keV。当引入f_CDM=0.01的CDM等曲率扰动时，限制放宽至m_WDM > 0.27keV，表明蓝倾斜等曲率涨落部分补偿了WDM的抑制效应。
AI.conclusion: 研究为存在CDM等曲率涨落时的热WDM提供了新的约束，并量化了此类涨落能够掩盖轻遗迹粒子小尺度特征的程度。即使少量CDM等曲率扰动也能显著改变对WDM质量的限制。

title: Constraining primordial non-Gaussianity from DESI DR1 quasars and Planck PR4 CMB Lensing
comment: 42 pages, 17 figures, 11 tables. Comments are welcome
summary: We present the first measurement of local-type primordial non-Gaussianity from the cross-correlation between $1.2$ million spectroscopically confirmed quasars from the first data release (DR1) of the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI) and the Planck PR4 CMB lensing reconstructions. The analysis is performed in three tomographic redshift bins covering $0.8 < z < 3.5$, covering a sky fraction of $\sim 20\%$. We adopt a catalog-based pseudo-$C_\ell$ estimator and apply linear imaging weights validated on noiseless mocks. Compared to previous analyses using photometric quasar samples, our results benefit from the high purity of the DESI spectroscopic sample, the reduced noise of PR4 lensing, and the absence of excess large-scale power in the spectroscopic quasar auto-correlation. Fitting simultaneously for the non-Gaussianity parameter $f_{\mathrm{NL}}$ and the linear bias amplitude in each redshift bin, we obtain $f_{\mathrm{NL}} = 2^{+28}_{-34}$ for a response parameter $p=1.6$, and $f_{\mathrm{NL}} = 6^{+20}_{-24}$ for $p=1.0$. These results improve the constraints on $f_{\mathrm{NL}}$ by $\sim 35\%$ compared to the previous analysis based on the Legacy Imaging Survey DR9. Our results demonstrate the statistical power of DESI quasars for probing inflationary physics, and highlight the promise of future DESI data releases.

AI.tldr: DESI光谱类星体与Planck CMB透镜化的交叉相关分析，首次测量局域型原初非高斯性参数f_NL，得到f_NL = 2^{+28}_{-34}（p=1.6）和f_NL = 6^{+20}_{-24}（p=1.0），相比之前分析约束提升了约35%。
AI.motivation: 利用DESI光谱类星体的高纯度和Planck PR4 CMB透镜化重建的低噪声，更精确地测量原初非高斯性参数f_NL，以探测宇宙暴胀物理。
AI.method: 使用120万个DESI DR1光谱确认的类星体与Planck PR4 CMB透镜化重建进行交叉相关分析，采用三个红移切片（0.8<z<3.5），覆盖约20%天区，使用基于星表的伪C_ℓ估计器并应用线性成像权重。
AI.result: 同时拟合f_NL和每个红移切片的线性偏置振幅，得到f_NL = 2^{+28}_{-34}（p=1.6）和f_NL = 6^{+20}_{-24}（p=1.0），约束相比之前Legacy Imaging Survey DR9分析提升了约35%。
AI.conclusion: DESI类星体在探测暴胀物理方面具有强大的统计能力，未来DESI数据发布将提供更有前景的结果。

title: Evolving and interacting dark energy: photometric and spectroscopic synergy with DES Y3 and DESI DR2
summary: We investigate the Dark Scattering (DS) interacting dark energy scenario, characterised by pure momentum exchange between dark matter and dark energy, allowing for a time-dependent equation-of-state described by the Chevallier-Polarski-Linder (CPL) parametrisation. This class of models is weakly constrained by CMB observations and can exhibit distinctive late-time suppression of structure growth. We derive constraints on cosmological, DS, and CPL parameters using three two-point correlation functions from the Dark Energy Survey Year 3 data, combined with baryon acoustic oscillation measurements from DESI, Type Ia supernovae from DES Year 5, and CMB data from Planck. We find the dark-sector interaction parameter $A_\mathrm{ds}$ to be consistent with zero for all data combinations, and that CPL provides a statistically preferred fit over DS for the selected probes. From the full data combination we obtain $w_0=-0.76\pm0.06, \, w_a=-0.77^{+0.23}_{-0.20}$ for CPL, and $w_0=-0.79^{+0.05}_{-0.06}, \, w_a=-0.56^{+0.24}_{-0.15}, \, (A_\mathrm{ds}=9.8^{+2.8}_{-9.5}\,\mathrm{bn/GeV} )$ for DS. The inclusion of DES photometric information improves the Figure-of-Merit on $(w_0,w_a)$ by $\sim$20% for CPL and $\sim$50% for DS relative to DESI+SN+CMB alone. We find no evidence for an $S_8$ discrepancy in either model. These results provide the most stringent pre-Euclid constraints on DS from a combined photometric and spectroscopic analysis.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用多种天文观测数据对暗散射相互作用暗能量模型进行约束，发现暗物质与暗能量相互作用参数与零一致，CPL参数化比DS模型更受数据支持，DES数据显著提高了参数约束精度。
AI.motivation: 研究暗散射相互作用暗能量模型，该模型通过纯动量交换描述暗物质与暗能量相互作用，并采用CPL参数化描述状态方程的时间依赖性。这类模型受CMB观测约束较弱，可能在晚期表现出独特的结构增长抑制特征。
AI.method: 使用暗能量巡天第三年数据的三种两点相关函数，结合DESI的重子声学振荡测量、DES第五年的Ia型超新星数据以及普朗克卫星的CMB数据，对宇宙学参数、暗散射参数和CPL参数进行约束分析。
AI.result: 暗区相互作用参数A_ds在所有数据组合中均与零一致；CPL模型在统计上比DS模型更受所选探测器的支持；完整数据组合得到CPL参数w0=-0.76±0.06, wa=-0.77^{+0.23}_{-0.20}，DS参数w0=-0.79^{+0.05}_{-0.06}, wa=-0.56^{+0.24}_{-0.15}, A_ds=9.8^{+2.8}_{-9.5} bn/GeV；DES光度信息使(w0,wa)的品质因子分别提高约20%和50%；两种模型均未发现S8差异。
AI.conclusion: 这是欧几里得任务前通过综合光度和光谱分析对暗散射模型最严格的约束，为理解暗能量与暗物质的相互作用提供了重要观测限制。

title: Gravitational wave oscillations in Multi-Proca dark energy models
summary: Gravitational wave oscillations arise from the exchange of energy between the metric perturbations and additional tensor modes. This phenomenon can occur even when the extra degrees of freedom consist of a triplet of massive Abelian vector fields, as in Multi-Proca dark energy models. In this work, we study gravitational wave oscillations in this class of models minimally coupled to gravity with a general potential, allowing also for a kinetic coupling between the vector field and dark matter that can, in principle, enhance the modulation of gravitational wave amplitudes. After consistently solving the background dynamics, requiring the model parameters to reproduce a phase of late-time accelerated expansion, we assess the accuracy of commonly used analytical approximations and quantify the impact of gravitational wave amplitude modulation for current detectors (LIGO--Virgo) and future missions such as LISA. Although oscillations are present in these scenarios, we find that the effective mass scale (the mixing mass) governing the phenomenon is $m_g \sim μ_A$, where $μ_A$ is the (time-dependent) effective mass of the vector dark-energy field. Detectability of gravitational wave oscillations, however, requires $m_g \gg H_0$, which is in tension with the ultra-light masses typically needed to drive accelerated expansion $μ_A \sim H_0 \sim 10^{-33}\,\mathrm{eV}$. Therefore, if gravitational wave oscillations were to be detected at the corresponding frequencies, they could not be attributed to these classes of dark-energy models.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了多Proca暗能量模型中引力波振荡现象，发现虽然存在振荡，但由于驱动宇宙加速膨胀所需的超轻质量与可探测振荡所需的大质量尺度存在矛盾，因此这类暗能量模型不太可能产生可探测的引力波振荡。
AI.motivation: 研究引力波振荡在多Proca暗能量模型中的表现，探索额外张量模式与度规扰动之间的能量交换现象，评估这类模型产生可探测引力波振荡的可能性。
AI.method: 通过一致求解背景动力学，要求模型参数重现晚期加速膨胀阶段，评估常用解析近似的准确性，并量化引力波振幅调制对当前探测器（LIGO-Virgo）和未来任务（如LISA）的影响。
AI.result: 虽然在这些场景中存在振荡，但控制该现象的有效质量尺度（混合质量）约为矢量暗能量场的有效质量。然而，引力波振荡的可探测性需要混合质量远大于哈勃常数，这与驱动加速膨胀所需的超轻质量存在矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 如果引力波振荡在相应频率被探测到，它们不能归因于这类暗能量模型，因为可探测振荡所需的质量尺度与驱动宇宙加速膨胀所需的超轻质量不相容。

title: The Competing Influence of Ram Pressure and Tidal Interaction in NGC 2276
summary: The evolution of galaxies in groups is profoundly influenced by a variety of physical processes, with ram pressure and tidal interactions playing pivotal roles in shaping their structural and evolutionary pathways. The relative influence of these two processes is still debated in groups compared to clusters, as ram pressure is less understood there. We study NGC 2276, a nearby galaxy (z$\sim$0.0079) where the dominant process is still an open question. We examine the distribution of stellar populations in NGC 2276 using multiwavelength data to assess potential evidence of tidal interactions and ram-pressure stripping. We present the first HST WFC3/UVIS images of NGC 2276, and use them to investigate the distribution of stellar populations across the disk of NGC 2276, where we assume that the bluer broadband filters mainly trace younger stellar populations, while the redder filters trace mainly older stellar populations. Furthermore, by comparing HST images with maps of H$α$ emission from Calar Alto's PMAS/PPAK integral field unit (IFU) and near-IR maps from Spitzer's IRAC, we identify arm-like overdensity features that trace the spiral structure of this galaxy and tracked the variation of their pitch angle with radius. Our results indicate that the distribution of the stellar populations is asymmetrical. The youngest stellar populations (up to $\sim$100 Myr) show higher concentration on the leading side of the galaxy and are more diffuse on the trailing side, consistent with gas compression due to ram-pressure. This asymmetry is visible in the red filters as well. We also show that the average pitch angles of the overdensity features increase with galactocentric distance. Our findings are consistent with the fact that ram pressure is the leading mechanism for the peculiar morphology of NGC 2276, but do not exclude the possibility that tidal interactions could have played a role.

AI.tldr: 研究通过多波段数据分析NGC 2276星系中恒星种群分布，发现年轻恒星在星系前导侧更集中，支持冲压剥离是主导机制，但潮汐作用也可能有贡献。
AI.motivation: 星系在星系群中的演化受多种物理过程影响，其中冲压剥离和潮汐相互作用是关键因素。在星系群中，冲压剥离的作用相对星系团更不明确，NGC 2276星系的主导机制仍存在争议，需要深入研究。
AI.method: 使用哈勃太空望远镜WFC3/UVIS首次获取NGC 2276的紫外-光学图像，结合Calar Alto的PMAS/PPAK积分视场单元Hα发射图和斯皮策太空望远镜的IRAC近红外数据，分析恒星种群分布。通过较蓝波段追踪年轻恒星，较红波段追踪年老恒星，并研究旋臂超密度特征的螺距角随半径变化。
AI.result: 恒星种群分布呈现不对称性：最年轻恒星（约1亿年）在星系前导侧更集中，在拖尾侧更弥散，这与冲压剥离导致的气体压缩一致。这种不对称性在红波段也可见。旋臂超密度特征的平均螺距角随银心距增加而增大。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持冲压剥离是导致NGC 2276特殊形态的主导机制，但不排除潮汐相互作用可能也起到了一定作用。这为理解星系群环境中星系演化机制提供了重要证据。

title: Archaeological investigation of galaxies' evolutionary history in the cosmic middle ages
comment: This contribution was submitted as a White Paper for the ESO Expanding Horizon initiative
summary: The cosmic Middle Ages, spanning the last 8-10 Gyr of the Universe, is a critical period in which massive early-formed systems coexist with global star formation quenching in less massive galaxies, yet galaxies experience further dynamical, morphological and chemical evolution. Understanding the relative role of internal drivers and of interaction with the evolving large-scale structures remains a highly complex and unsettled issue. To make transformative progress on these questions we must characterize the physical and kinematic properties (integrated and spatially resolved) of stellar populations in galaxies, fossil record of their past star formation and assembly histories, together with gas properties, across a wide range of masses and environmental scales, over this critical cosmic epoch. Volume-representative samples of 10^6 galaxies down to 10^9 solar masses are essential to fully trace the complex interplay between physical processes and to physically connect progenitor and descendant galaxy populations. This demands a deep and extensive survey with high signal-to-noise, medium-resolution, rest-frame optical spectroscopy. Current and planned facilities in the 2020-2030s cannot simultaneously achieve the required sample size, spectral quality, mass limit, and spatial coverage. A dedicated large-aperture spectroscopic facility with wide-area high-multiplex MOS and large field-of-view IFU is needed to provide transformative insights into the physical mechanisms regulating star formation and galaxy evolution.

AI.tldr: 宇宙中世纪（过去80-100亿年）是星系演化关键期，需要大规模光谱巡天研究星系物理性质与环境相互作用
AI.motivation: 理解宇宙中世纪星系演化中内部驱动因素与大尺度结构相互作用的相对重要性，这是一个高度复杂且未解决的问题
AI.method: 提出需要建设专用大口径光谱设施，配备大面积高复用多目标光谱仪和大视场积分视场单元，获取高质量、中分辨率、静止光学光谱数据
AI.result: 当前及计划中的2020-2030年代设施无法同时满足所需样本规模、光谱质量、质量下限和空间覆盖要求
AI.conclusion: 需要专用大口径光谱设施来提供对恒星形成和星系演化物理机制的变革性见解
